description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named .NET Core that runs on every push to develop, release/*, and master branches, and on pull requests to these branches. Use three jobs on different environments: ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest. For each job, set up .NET 5.0.x, 6.0.x, and 7.x SDKs, check out the repository, install required libraries, restore, build, and test the project with .NET 6.0.x and 7.0.x.
